overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective walking along a desert highway shoulder during golden hour. Vehicles including semi-trucks and cars pass by on the left while the camera moves steadily forward with mountains visible in the distance under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: Big Goods semi-truck passes by on the left side of the highway
Black sedan overtakes and passes by quickly on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder next to moving traffic with the overpass visible ahead

notable_agents.action: Big Goods semi-truck with white trailer driving past on the highway
Black sedan overtaking traffic and passing by at high speed

entered.detail: Concrete highway overpass spanning across the road in the distance
Tall metal electrical transmission tower against the sky
Large mountain visible in the hazy distance beyond the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert highway during golden hour, with the camera walking along the dirt shoulder. A concrete overpass spans the road ahead while a Big Goods semi-truck and black sedan pass by on the left. Power line towers stand tall on the right side against the partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with rocky hillside on right

events.description: Large black semi-truck passes very close to the camera on the left
Yellow and red Cola truck passes by closely on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder as large trucks pass by very closely on the left

notable_agents.action: Black semi-truck passing extremely close to the camera position
Yellow Cola truck with red branding passing by closely

entered.detail: Steep rocky terrain with sparse desert vegetation on the right side of the shoulder

segments.scene_description: As the camera moves forward, the rocky hillside becomes prominent on the right while large trucks including a black semi and a yellow Cola truck pass by very closely on the left. The highway overpass recedes into the background as the power line towers grow larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert highway approaching mountain pass

events.description: White RV camper drives past on the left side of the highway
Motorcycle overtakes traffic and passes by quickly on the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the open highway with the mountain vista ahead, various vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: White RV camper driving steadily past on the highway
Motorcycle overtaking other vehicles and passing by at speed

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera continuing along the open desert highway with the rocky hillside now very close on the right. Power line towers line the route as an RV and motorcycle pass by on the left. The mountain remains visible in the distant center as the road stretches ahead through the arid landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a desert highway shoulder that shifts from an open road under an overpass to a narrow corridor between a rocky hillside and passing traffic. It begins by walking past a concrete overpass as a semi-truck and black sedan speed by on the left, with power line towers standing against a partly cloudy golden hour sky. As the camera moves forward, the overpass recedes into the distance while the rocky hillside on the right becomes more prominent and larger trucks, including a yellow Cola truck, pass closely by. The scene then expands further along the arid landscape, with the power line towers lining the route and the rocky terrain pressing closer to the frame. Finally, the camera continues its steady advance as an RV and motorcycle pass on the left, keeping a distant mountain centered in the view as the road stretches ahead.
